com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXAvailability

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXAction, IXApplicationAction, IXDesignTabPanel, IXFunctionDesignAction, IXFunctionDesignInspectionPanel, IXFunctionDesignTabPanel, IXHarnessAction, IXHarnessDesignTabPanel, IXHarnessInspectionPanel, IXInspectionPanel, IXIntegratorAction, IXIntegratorDesignTabPanel, IXIntegratorInspectionPanel, IXLogicAction, IXLogicDesignTabPanel, IXLogicInspectionPanel, IXPlatformArchitectureDesignAction, IXSBOMAction, IXTopologyAction, IXTopologyDesignTabPanel, IXTopologyInspectionPanel

    public interface IXAvailability
    This interface provides a means of identifying whether this plugin, be it an IXAction or an IXInspectionPanel, is currently available for use within the tool.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean isAvailable(IXApplicationContext context)
      Is the plugin available now?

    • Method Detail

      • isAvailable

        boolean isAvailable(IXApplicationContext context)
        Is the plugin available now?

        This method returns a boolean that indicates whether this plugin is currently available for use by the application.

        The plugin may make this determination based on the available information in the IXApplicationContext passed to it.

        For IXAction plugins, this decision will usually be made on the basis of the content of the set of selected objects.

        For IXInspectionPanel plugins, this decision should NOT be based on the selected objects, but some other criteria, otherwise odd behaviour will result. Usually, IXInspectionPanel will just return true for this method.

        Parameters:
        context - - the application context.
        Returns:
        true, if the plugin is available based on the information in the application context, otherwise false.
